title: Senior Teacher - Navneet Education - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Navneet Education - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navneet Education. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About Navneet Education:
Navneet Education is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navneet Education!
